rows.description: 1825 Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: All extractors agreed on all fields. Value used as consensus.

rows.description: Vincent's Deficiency of Salary to Nov. 2. 1824.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Vincent to make up a deficiency in his salary up to 2 November 1824, amounting to £50 0s 3d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of a tenement at Waldron, amounting to £200 0s 0d.

rows.description: 17'5. To Mr Dalby for Three Liquidation Funds ---
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it more accurately reflects '17'5.', 'Three Liquidation Funds', and trailing dashes '---' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'prize liquidation Fund' and missing elements.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Dalby in respect of three liquidation funds.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Dalby in respect of three liquidation funds, amounting to £200 0s 0d.

rows.description: 29. Power of Attorney for transfer of Jesus Fund ---
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it correctly includes the leading '29.' and trailing dashes '---', as observed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment for a power of attorney to effect the transfer of the Jesus Fund.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for a power of attorney to effect the transfer of the Jesus Fund, amounting to £1 4s 2d.

rows.description: Dec. 11. To Mr Davenport on Acct. of the Vicarage Estate Aug. 17. 1824 at Hillington - see coll. Register p.347. - July 4- -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description is a combination based on visual verification. 'Dec. 11.' is present from gemini-flash. The location is 'Hillington' (gemini-flash correct) not 'Kidlington' (gpt-5-mini incorrect). gemini-flash's capture of the braced, multi-line sub-text is more complete.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Davenport on account of the Hillington vicarage estate (transaction dated 17 August 1824; see college register p.347).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Davenport on account of the Hillington vicarage estate (transaction dated 17 August 1824; see college register p.347), amounting to £200 0s 0d.

rows.description: 3. To Mr Heyes. Improved Stip. for Merton Nov. 1824
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it accurately includes the leading '3.', 'Merton', and 'Nov.', which are more precise than gpt-5-mini's 'Weston. Adm.'
rows.english_description: Improved stipend paid to Mr Heyes in respect of Merton, covering up to November 1824.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Improved stipend paid to Mr Heyes in respect of Merton, covering up to November 1824, amounting to £26 5s 0d.

rows.notes: All extractors agreed on all fields. Value used as consensus.

rows.description: Jan. 31. Subscription to St Clement's Church -----
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it correctly captures 'St Clement's' (without a period after St) and the trailing dashes '-----', as observed visually.
rows.english_description: Subscription paid to St Clement's Church.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription paid to St Clement's Church, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.description: Feb. 15. C.o for a Cottage grate in the Porter's lodge. 13.6. and a fixed Bedstead in Do. 2.2.0. -----
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash for its accuracy. gpt-5-mini's notes revealed a misinterpretation of the sub-amounts ('13s 6d and 2s 2d' vs actual '13.6.' and '2.2.0.' which correctly sum to £2 15s 6d). Visually confirmed 'C.o' and the specific numerical notation for sub-items and trailing dashes.
rows.english_description: Purchase of a cottage grate and a fixed bedstead for the porter's lodge.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of a cottage grate and a fixed bedstead for the porter's lodge, amounting to £2 15s 6d.

rows.description: March 6. To J. Maffey. for four Months Service at the Porter's Lodge
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it includes the period after 'Maffey' and proper capitalization of 'Lodge', as observed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to J. Maffey for four months' service at the porter's lodge.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to J. Maffey for four months' service at the porter's lodge, amounting to £15 0s 0d.

rows.description: March 16 To Mr Patience for Surveying the work in the Common Room Servant's Hall
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gpt-5-mini as it correctly includes 'March' as part of the date, as observed visually.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Patience for surveying the work in the common room and servants' hall, amounting to £7 14s 6d.

rows.description: March 25 To Mr Heyes. Improved Stip: to LDay 1825 -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description is a combination: 'March 25' from gpt-5-mini and 'Stip:' with trailing dash from gemini-flash, based on visual verification.
rows.english_description: Improved stipend paid to Mr Heyes up to Lady Day 1825.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Improved stipend paid to Mr Heyes up to Lady Day 1825, amounting to £26 5s 0d.

rows.description: April 20 Domus Wine Bottles. Rtm. t LDay 1825 -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description is a combination: 'April 20' from gpt-5-mini and 'Rtm. t LDay 1825 -' from gemini-flash, as 'Rtm. t LDay' and the trailing dash are more visually accurate than 'Alm. H. Day'.
rows.english_description: Account for college wine bottles (Domus), reconciled/returned at Lady Day 1825.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Account for college wine bottles (Domus), reconciled/returned at Lady Day 1825, amounting to £4 6s 0d.

rows.description: May 23. To Mr Dalby. p.f.ps Int. to the library. D.D. 1825 -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it more accurately transcribes 'p.f.ps' and 'D.D. 1825' along with the trailing dash, as observed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Dalby relating to interest due to the library (D.D. 1825).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Dalby relating to interest due to the library (D.D. 1825), amounting to £21 12s 0d.

rows.description: June 14 Mr Davis's Bill for Surveys at Little Tew -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it correctly identifies the date as 'June 14' (not 'June 11') and the place name as 'Tew' (not 'Ten'), and includes the trailing dash, as observed visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Davis for surveying work at Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Davis for surveying work at Little Tew, amounting to £13 12s 0d.

rows.description: June 17 Mr Dixon's D.o for Surveys. at. various places. p.v -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description is a combination: 'June 17' from gpt-5-mini and the detailed 'D.o for Surveys. at. various places. p.v -' from gemini-flash, which is more complete and accurate visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Dixon for surveying work at various places.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Dixon for surveying work at various places, amounting to £80 19s 0d.

rows.description: June 17 Mr B. Pitt's D.o for - D.o at. - - - p.v -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description is a combination: 'June 17' (implied by previous line, explicitly stated by gpt-5-mini for this line) and 'Mr B. Pitt's D.o for - D.o at. - - - p.v -' from gemini-flash, which correctly identifies the name as 'B. Pitt's' (not 'Bidles') and includes the full details and dashes.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr B. Pitt for surveying work (as per preceding survey entries).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr B. Pitt for surveying work, amounting to £45 7s 0d.

rows.description: June 25 Merton Land Tax. one yr. to Mich. 1824 -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description is a combination: 'June 25' from gpt-5-mini and 'one yr. to Mich. 1824 -' from gemini-flash, as 'yr.' and 'Mich.' are more faithful to the abbreviations and the trailing dash is present visually.
rows.english_description: Payment of the Merton land tax for one year to Michaelmas 1824.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the Merton land tax for one year to Michaelmas 1824, amounting to £34 19s 4d.

rows.description: To Mr Closes. one yrs Int. on his Deposit. to Do -

rows.english_description: One year's interest paid to Mr Closes on his deposit.
rows.english_description_with_amount: One year's interest paid to Mr Closes on his deposit, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.description: June 30 To Grove. for Venison -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description is a combination: 'June 30' from gpt-5-mini and 'Grove.' with trailing dash from gemini-flash, as 'Grove' (with period) is visually more accurate than 'Groves'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Grove for venison supplied to the college.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Grove for venison supplied to the college, amounting to £6 12s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for horse hire incurred on college business, amounting to £1 3s 0d.

rows.english_description: Subscription paid to the Lunatic Asylum.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription paid to the Lunatic Asylum, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.description: Aug. 9. To Mr Davenport on Acct. of Kidlington Vicarage Estate - p. Sup. Dec. 11

Vic.'), and the additional note 'p. Sup. Dec. 11' from gemini-flash (which is visually present above the amount column, treated as part of the description for completeness).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Davenport on account of the Kidlington vicarage estate (see supplementary entry 11 December), amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: July 27 To Mr Heyes. Impr. Stip. to Mids. 1825 -

rows.english_description_with_amount: Improved stipend paid to Mr Heyes up to Midsummer 1825, amounting to £26 5s 0d.

rows.description: Oct. 12 To Mess.rs Williams & Dalby. on Acct. of Bavoristock -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it more accurately transcribes 'Mess.rs', 'Acct.', 'Bavoristock', and the trailing dash, as observed visually.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Messrs Williams and Dalby on account of Bavoristock, amounting to £13 7s 0d.

rows.description: To the Rector for 5 yrs Arrear of Gosford Tythes. drawn ad by him in the Dividends. & irrecoverable -
rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash as it more accurately transcribes 'Arrear' and the specific wording 'drawn ad by him in the Dividends. & irrecoverable' including the trailing dash, compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Annuity... advanced by him Unrecoverable'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Rector representing five years' arrears of Gosford tithes, drawn and accounted for in the dividends as irrecoverable.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Rector representing five years' arrears of Gosford tithes, drawn and accounted for in the dividends as irrecoverable, amounting to £0 14s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed. Description chosen from gemini-flash (empty string) as the word 'Total' is not explicitly written on the ledger page next to the amount, making an empty description more faithful to the instruction 'text as it appears on the page'.
